text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp, where we'll spend each and every
day training hard, begins today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I have to go to the hospital again? And you, you're something else.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Just head over to the campsite. You know you
don't have to come with me, right?
choice_data_list: Forget about that. Let's get moving!
Forget about that. Let's get moving!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Tosen Jordan gets her toenails examined
and picks up her medicine, we meet with
everyone at the camp.
